title: The Ultimate Infection Modpack
description: A modpack with 5 different infection mods for you to survive!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e5d0e66a5a6aedec337ff49d5fe5f9cddf1ada.png)


This is a modpack that adds five different infection mods for you to survive and fend off.

this also isnt a easy modpack.

It requires a mod not on modrinth called **[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)**

<details>
<summary>Infection mods</summary>

> 1.Fungal Infection:Spore

> 2.Dawn of the Flood - "Rising Tides"

> 3.Contagion - A Zombie Infection Mod

> 4.TFTH

> 5.Sculk Horde

</details>
